summary: W879 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while assembling W847 selected-cochain direct-source data from the W851 comparison surface, then reusing the W878 and W877 stable ExactAt route. Product success remains false because the one W735 exact-input branch, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W879 moves the latest stable ExactAt boundary to the W851 comparison selected-cochain surface, but the W735 exact-input branch is still not instantiated.

The remaining W735 exact-input branch expands to nine fields: WPP boundary data, relation data, target surjectivity/compactness, selected-difference component closedness, mapped-cokernel closedness, normalized fixed-target data, source triangulation data, endpoint strict-topology data, and localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for one W735 closed-map or closed-embedding exact-input branch, including the nine expanded W735 fields.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
